title: Benchmark History
subtitle: Past benchmark runs, newest first

create.title: New Benchmark
create.subtitle: Configure a benchmark or load test, then submit

compareDisabledNeedTwo: Select at least 2 benchmarks to compare

empty.title: No benchmarks yet
empty.description: Click "New Benchmark" in the top-right to trigger one.

metrics.title: Summary metrics
metrics.empty: No metrics recorded for this benchmark.

baseline.unsetConfirmBody: This removes the baseline mark; the benchmark itself stays. Other benchmarks that compared against this baseline keep their data; their `baselineId` link is cleared.

dialog.title: Set as baseline
dialog.body: Mark this benchmark as a reference for future regression diffs.

errors.alreadyExists: This benchmark already has a baseline.

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.body: It may have been deleted, or you may not own it.

delete.confirmBody: It will be removed from history along with its raw output. This cannot be undone.

cancel.confirmBody: The benchmark will stop and its backing K8s job will be removed. The record stays in history with status 'canceled'.

rerun.connectionMissingTooltip: The original connection has been deleted; pick a new one from "New Benchmark" instead.

verdict.title: vs baseline
verdict.loadError: Could not load baseline for comparison

requestDetails.title: Request details
requestDetails.hint: Connection settings (baseUrl / apiKey / headers / queryParams) reflect the live connection; if it has been edited since this benchmark ran, what was actually sent may differ
requestDetails.connectionMissing: Connection deleted — URL and credentials cannot be resolved

unsupportedCategory.guidellm: guidellm does not support '{{category}}' connections — try vegeta or genai-perf instead
unsupportedCategory.genaiPerf: genai-perf does not support '{{category}}' connections — try vegeta instead

compare.title: Compare Benchmarks
compare.subtitle: {{n}} benchmarks · {{tool}}
compare.baselineMissing: {{failed}} benchmark(s) no longer accessible — comparing the remaining {{n}}
compare.mixedToolsBody: Compare requires the same tool. Selected: {{summary}}
compare.mixedScenariosBody: Compare requires the same scenario. Selected: {{scenarios}}
compare.needTwoEmpty: Select 2+ benchmarks from the list to compare

empty.title: Pick a scenario, then select benchmarks
empty.listEmpty: No completed benchmarks for this scenario yet.
